title: SOL 24pk x 50g Toilet Cistern Blocks, Blue Ocean Scent Freshener Tablets, Each Lasts 14 Days, Powerful Rim and Bowl Cleaning, Long-Lasting Fragrance, Prevents Limescale, and Effectively Fights Odours
features: Keeps Your Toilet Fresh: Each pack includes 24 blue toilet blocks or toilet freshener, perfect for use as toilet cistern blocks to provide continuous cleaning and freshness for up to 14 days per block.

Effective Cleaning Power: Designed to tackle build-up, these cistern blocks or toilet fresheners rim are ideal as limescale remover toilet cistern solutions, leaving your toilet bowl sparkling clean after every flush.

Convenient & Easy to Use: Simply drop the in-cistern toilet blocks or toilet blue into your cistern or use as rim blocks for toilets and toilet cistern cleaner – both methods ensure hassle-free cleaning.
Fresh Ocean Fragrance: These toilet cleaner tablets, also known as blue loo toilet blocks for cistern, deliver a refreshing ocean scent while keeping your bathroom fresh and inviting.

Versatile Usage: Perfect for use as toilet tablets for cleaning in bowl, toilet bomb, or bleach blocks for toilet cistern, these multi-purpose cleaning blocks and toilet smell refresher suit both home and commercial needs.

Simply drop a toilet block into the cistern. It dissolves gradually, releasing cleaning agents that help prevent limescale, fight odours, and keep your toilet bowl fresh with every flush. How long does each toilet freshener block last? Each block provides continuous cleaning and freshness for up to 14 days, depending on water usage. Regular use helps maintain a clean and odour-free toilet. Can I use these cistern blocks in all types of toilets? Yes, these blue toilet cistern blocks are compatible with most standard cisterns and work effectively in both home and commercial settings. Do the blocks help with limescale build-up? Yes, the powerful formula helps to prevent and reduce limescale build-up, ensuring a cleaner toilet bowl and improved hygiene with every flush. Will these in-cistern toilet blocks affect my plumbing or septic system? Toilet cleaner tablets dissolve safely in water and are designed not to cause blockages or damage plumbing, making them suitable for standard toilet systems.
